text: Kerala needs more private investment and industry, even if it means some government sector reduction.
Government hospitals and public schools will always serve ordinary Keralites better than private ones.
Religious and community organisations should stay out of political decision-making.
Large infrastructure projects are worth pursuing even when they face community opposition.
Protecting Kerala's land, forests and waterways should come before industrial development.
A government that delivers stability and development deserves to continue, regardless of controversies.
